result.summary: mashape.com now redirects developers to Kong’s public integration surface: Konnect HTTP APIs, a Konnect MCP server, and CLIs decK/Inso; Konnect access token is the primary credential, plus Kong Gateway license for enterprise quickstarts.

konnect_access_token.label: Konnect Access Token
konnect_access_token.setup: Go to [Konnect account tokens](https://cloud.konghq.com/global/account/tokens) and create a new access token. Kong’s docs use it for Konnect quickstart and platform tooling; paste the token where prompted or export it as `KONNECT_TOKEN` when a script asks for it.
